'''âm-k-y''' ('''makaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anglicise|anglicise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anglicise|anglicise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-k-y
|-
! Lemma
| makaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:makayithi|makayithi]] || [[word:makayiji|makayiji]] || [[word:makayishi|makayishi]] || [[word:makayi|makayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:makayuthuth|makayuthuth]] || [[word:makayujuj|makayujuj]] || [[word:makayushush|makayushush]] || [[word:makay|makay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:makayuthu|makayuthu]] || [[word:makayuju|makayuju]] || [[word:makayushu|makayushu]] || [[word:makayu|makayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:makayufuth|makayufuth]] || [[word:makayufuj|makayufuj]] || [[word:makayufush|makayufush]] || [[word:makayuf|makayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:makayethe|makayethe]] || [[word:makayeje|makayeje]] || [[word:makayeshe|makayeshe]] || [[word:makaye|makaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:makayothoth|makayothoth]] || [[word:makayojoj|makayojoj]] || [[word:makayoshosh|makayoshosh]] || [[word:makay|makay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:makayotho|makayotho]] || [[word:makayojo|makayojo]] || [[word:makayosho|makayosho]] || [[word:makayo|makayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:makayofoth|makayofoth]] || [[word:makayofoj|makayofoj]] || [[word:makayofosh|makayofosh]] || [[word:makayof|makayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:makayĂŠthĂŠ|makayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:makayĂŠjĂŠ|makayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:makayĂŠshĂŠ|makayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:makayĂŠ|makayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:makayathath|makayathath]] || [[word:makayajaj|makayajaj]] || [[word:makayashash|makayashash]] || [[word:makay|makay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:makayatha|makayatha]] || [[word:makayaja|makayaja]] || [[word:makayasha|makayasha]] || [[word:makaya|makaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:makayafath|makayafath]] || [[word:makayafaj|makayafaj]] || [[word:makayafash|makayafash]] || [[word:makayaf|makayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:makayasha|makayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomakayasha|gomakayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimakayasha|gokimakayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:makaynĂŒsha|makaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomakaynknĂŒsha|gomakaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimakaynĂŒsha|gokimakaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:makayshĂ«sha|makayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomakaynkshĂ«sha|gomakaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimakayshĂ«sha|gokimakayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:makayrosha|makayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomakaynkrosha|gomakaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimakayrosha|gokimakayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:makaymusha|makaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomakaynkmusha|gomakaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimakaymusha|gokimakaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:makaysherasha|makaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomakaynksherasha|gomakaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimakaysherasha|gokimakaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:makayngasha|makayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomakaynkngasha|gomakaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimakayngasha|gokimakayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:makayasha|makayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomakaynkyasha|gomakaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimakayasha|gokimakayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:makayamasha|makayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomakaynkyamasha|gomakaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimakayamasha|gokimakayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:makaynĂŒshĂ«sha|makaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomakaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomakaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimakaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimakaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:makaynĂŒrosha|makaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomakaynknĂŒrosha|gomakaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimakaynĂŒrosha|gokimakaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:makaynĂŒmusha|makaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomakaynknĂŒmusha|gomakaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimakaynĂŒmusha|gokimakaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:makayshĂ«nĂŒsha|makayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomakaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomakaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimakayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimakayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:makayshĂ«rosha|makayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomakaynkshĂ«rosha|gomakaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimakayshĂ«rosha|gokimakayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:makayshĂ«musha|makayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomakaynkshĂ«musha|gomakaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimakayshĂ«musha|gokimakayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:makayronĂŒsha|makayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomakaynkronĂŒsha|gomakaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimakayronĂŒsha|gokimakayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:makayroshĂ«sha|makayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomakaynkroshĂ«sha|gomakaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimakayroshĂ«sha|gokimakayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:makayromusha|makayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomakaynkromusha|gomakaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimakayromusha|gokimakayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:makaymunĂŒsha|makaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomakaynkmunĂŒsha|gomakaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimakaymunĂŒsha|gokimakaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:makaymushĂ«sha|makaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomakaynkmushĂ«sha|gomakaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimakaymushĂ«sha|gokimakaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:makaymurosha|makaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomakaynkmurosha|gomakaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimakaymurosha|gokimakaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:makay|makay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠkĂŠy|mĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homakay|homakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠkĂŠy|homĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomakay|hohomakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠkĂŠy|hohomĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmakay|nĂŒmakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠkĂŠy|nĂŒmĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmakay|nĂŒnĂŒmakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠkĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmakay|nĂŻmakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠkĂŠy|nĂŻmĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmakay|nĂŻnĂŻmakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠkĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumakay|lumakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠkĂŠy|lumĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumakay|lulumakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠkĂŠy|lulumĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limakay|limakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠkĂŠy|limĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimakay|lilimakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠkĂŠy|lilimĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komakay|komakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠkĂŠy|komĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomakay|kokomakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠkĂŠy|kokomĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemakay|kemakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠkĂŠy|kemĂŠkĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemakay|kekemakay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠkĂŠy|kekemĂŠkĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
